{{Quote|Isn't it ''funny'' how appearances can be deceiving, ''little Padawan''?|Alysun Celz, to Anakin Skywalker|<ref name="PM" />}}
'''Alysun Celz''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] who served the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Celz fell to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] and began committing crimes. She attempted to persuade her fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Et Rex]] to join her; after his refusal, the [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] framed and arrested him for their crimes. As they were enroute to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] so that Rex could stand trial, their [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|cruiser]], the ''[[Radiant IX]]'', crashed on the [[Poison Moon/Legends|Poison Moon]] [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]]. Celz murdered the [[Starship/Legends|ship's]] crew, while Rex escaped to the asteroid's surface.

When Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], investigated the crash, Celz gave them false information about Rex and insisted that he killed the ship's crew. She stayed aboard the ship with Skywalker as Kenobi searched for Rex, and eventually began [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] Skywalker with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]]. Celz was [[Skirmish on the Poison Moon|attacked]] by Kenobi and Rex, who had revealed the truth about the Dark Jedi. She was successfully incapacitated by Rex and was brought to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by the three Jedi to stand trial.

==Biography==
{{Quote|We were ''friends'' before the dark side seduced her. Alysun made it look like ''I'' was responsible for the blood on ''her'' hands.|Et Rex, regarding Celz|<ref name="PM" />}}
[[File:Etrex.jpg|thumb|left|200px|Alysun Celz was friends with Et Rex before falling to the dark side and framing him for her crimes.]]
Alysun Celz, a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|female]], was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] during the final [[Standard decade/Legends|decades]] of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. She was [[Jedi training/Legends|instructed]] in the ways of [[The Force/Legends|the Force]] by the [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]], eventually [[Jedi Trials/Legends|rising]] to the rank of [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]].<ref name="CSWE">{{CSWECite|I|115|Celz, Alysun}}</ref> During that [[Time/Legends|time]], she befriended fellow [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Et Rex]]. However, in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], Celz succumbed to the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side of the Force]] and began to commit various crimes. When Celz invited Rex to join her, he refused, and she subsequently framed her former friend. The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] took Rex [[Prisoner/Legends|prisoner]] and attempted to bring him to the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] on the [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]], [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], [[Pilot/Legends|piloting]] the [[Consular-class light cruiser/Legends|''Consular''-class cruiser]] ''[[Radiant IX]]''. En route to Coruscant, the [[Starship/Legends|starship's]] [[Power coupling/Legends|power couplings]] failed due to a flock of [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]], forcing Celz to crash on the surface of the [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] [[Poison Moon/Legends|Poison Moon]], which was located in the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system's]] [[Hoth asteroid field/Legends|asteroid field]]. Celz proceeded to [[Death/Legends|kill]] the crew with [[Force lightning/Legends|Force lightning]], although Rex escaped to the surface.<ref name="PM" />

When the ''Radiant IX'' failed to reach the Temple, the High Council dispatched Jedi Knight [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and his [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Anakin Skywalker]], to find and detain Rex. As they searched the [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] for signs of life, Celz attacked the two Jedi with a [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]]; however, they disarmed her and questioned her involvement with the deaths of the crew. She deceived Kenobi by affirming that Rex slew the ''Radiant IX''{{'s}} crew, and she was left with Skywalker while Kenobi went out on the asteroid's surface to search for Rex.<ref name="PM" />

Shortly thereafter, Celz attempted to convince Skywalker to take Kenobi's vessel and leave, but when the Padawan refused, she began [[Torture/Legends|torturing]] him with Force lightning. However, Kenobi, who had encountered Rex and discovered the truth about Celz, [[Skirmish on the Poison Moon|attempted to stop her]] from attacking his Padawan. Celz caught Kenobi with the lightning, however, and proceeded to torture them both. She was interrupted by Rex, who had thrown a mynock at her so that it would attack and distract her from Kenobi and Skywalker. After he threw a second mynock at her, she attempted to get them off her, which resulted in Celz [[Stun/Legends|stunning]] herself until she was incapacitated. Celz was detained by the Jedi and brought back to the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] to stand trial.<ref name="PM" />

==Personality and traits==
{{Quote|When she fell to the dark side, I never imagined it would end up like this!|Et Rex, to Obi-Wan Kenobi, regarding Celz|<ref name="PM" />}}
[[File:Celz_lightning.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Celz uses Force lightning against Anakin Skywalker.]]
Alysun Celz was light-skinned with flowing [[Color/Legends|black]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and brown [[Eye/Legends|eyes]]. After falling to the dark side, she attempted to persuade Et Rex to join her and subsequently framed her friend for the crimes she committed when he refused. She enjoyed torturing her victims with Force lightning and was also capable of wielding a blaster. In addition, Celz knew that the [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] who visited the planet [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]] called the name of the asteroid Poison Moon because it resembled one from the world's surface. She made it a point to relate this to Anakin Skywalker before she tortured him.<ref name="PM" />

==Powers and abilities==
Celz was [[Force-sensitive/Legends|sensitive]] to the Force and earned an elevation to the rank of Jedi Knight.<ref name="CSWE" /> She was proficient in the use of Force lightning, using the [[Force power/Legends|power]] to murder the crew of the ''Radiant IX'' and torture Anakin Skywalker and Obi-Wan Kenobi.<ref name="PM" />

==Behind the scenes==
Alysun Celz was created by [[Michael Carriglitto]] for the short story "[[Poison Moon (comic story)|Poison Moon]]," which appeared in issues 44–47 of the ''[[Dark Horse Extra]]'', a series of monthly four-page [[Star Wars comic books|comic]] anthologies. Issues 44–47 were published from [[February]] to [[May]] [[2002]], with the art being provided by [[Adrian Sibar]]. Celz garnered an entry in ''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' in [[2008]].
